title: portulaca perennis
intro: Portulaca perennis, also known as the perennial purslane or creeping sandmat, is a low-growing, spreading annual or perennial succulent plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Portulaca perennis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
